$schema_note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Movie Producer (Video Production) department pipeline. Mirrors the Presentations PIPELINE-MANIFEST.json enforcement spine (v14.1.0). Build-time lockstep (47-movie-producer/scripts/video_sync_check.py) validates executive_producer.py + video_build_check.py + the MASTER-VIDEO-QC-AUTOFAIL-RULESET.md Section-5 table + the video role-library/sops dirs against THIS file, in BOTH directions. The deterministic driver executive_producer.py walks phases[] in ascending `order`; before dispatching phase N, EVERY lower-order phase must carry an attestation in working/checkpoints/video_process_manifest.json AND its produces_artifact on disk, else HARD ABORT (AF-VID-PHASE-SKIPPED, exit 2). SOP-LOCKED: any added/changed SOP, role, or gate MUST update this manifest (and bump manifest_version), add an enforcing py_symbol in executive_producer.py / video_build_check.py, add the AF code to the MASTER ruleset Section-5 table, and add a negative test in test_video_preflight.py. video_sync_check.py exits 4 (drift) if any of those is skipped.

deliverables_required.label: completed production brief / job manifest
deliverables_required.note: >256 bytes; produced at V-DEFINE. Carries job_id, pipeline_selected, brief fields, requestor, created_at.

deliverables_required.label: ffprobe-validated render receipt
deliverables_required.note: >256 bytes; produced at V-IMPROVE. Must carry ffprobe_pass:true + a real kie_task_id when Kie generation was in scope.

deliverables_required.label: the finished, ffprobe-validated MP4 deliverable
deliverables_required.note: >100KB; a sub-100KB MP4 implies an empty/placeholder render. Produced at V-IMPROVE, delivered at V-CONTROL.

phases.name: Define — Production Brief Intake + Pipeline Manifest Selection

preflight.label: job-manifest.json (brief_complete:true — topic, target_duration_sec, aspect_ratio, budget_ceiling_usd, tone all present)

phases.name: Measure — Pre-Flight, Provider Audit, Budget Measurement

additional_preflights.label: provider audit (kie AVAILABLE; every native paid provider UNAVAILABLE; AF-VID-PROVIDER-AUDIT)

phases.name: Analyze — Rule-Zero Announce + Approval Gate (paid only)

preflight.label: Rule-Zero approval receipt (rule_zero_announced_at + approval_received_at + approved_by; CONDITIONAL on paid path — free documentary path defers via a logged owner-authorized skip)

phases.name: Improve — Pipeline Execution, Render, ffprobe Validation

preflight.label: render receipt (ffprobe_pass:true + ffprobe_duration>0 + a video stream)

additional_preflights.label: anti-fabrication (when kie_in_scope:true the render receipt carries a non-null, non-placeholder kie_task_id + kie_result_url; AF-VID-FABRICATED-RECEIPT)
native-provider ban (no FAL/Runway/HeyGen/OpenAI/Google native key was present at generation time; AF-VID-NATIVE-PROVIDER)

phases.name: Control — Post-Render QC, Budget Reconciliation, Handoff

preflight.label: delivery completeness (job-manifest status:complete + final MP4 present + budget reconciled + handoff declared)

autofails.trigger: the V-DEFINE job-manifest.json is missing or does not set brief_complete:true, OR is missing any required brief field (topic, target_duration_sec, aspect_ratio, budget_ceiling_usd, tone). A production job started on an incomplete brief routinely requires a full restart; the brief is the precondition for every downstream phase.

the V-MEASURE receipt is missing or does not set preflight_pass:true. The runtime-dependency preflight (ffmpeg / node>=18 / npx hyperframes / python deps) must pass before pipeline execution; a failing preflight is never worked around.

the provider availability audit did not pass: provider_audit_pass is not true, OR kie is not AVAILABLE, OR any native paid provider (FAL/Runway/HeyGen/OpenAI/Google/flux/veo/kling/minimax/xai) is reported AVAILABLE. An unexpected native key could route assets outside Kie.AI — assets must route ONLY through Kie on the client box.

the V-MEASURE budget gate failed: budget_gate_pass is not true, OR estimated_cost_usd exceeds the brief's budget_ceiling_usd (== config.yaml budget.total_usd). HARD STOP — switch to the free documentary-montage path or obtain an explicit budget-cap increase. V-ANALYZE refuses to run without budget_gate_pass.

a paid job (kie_in_scope:true) reached generation without a logged Rule-Zero announcement: the approval receipt lacks rule_zero_announced_at. Rule Zero is binding — provider + model + estimated USD must be announced BEFORE any paid call. The free documentary path defers this via a logged owner-authorized skip of V-ANALYZE.

a paid job (kie_in_scope:true) reached generation without an explicit human approval: the approval receipt lacks approval_received_at and/or approved_by. The job must wait for an explicit APPROVE before any paid Kie call. V-IMPROVE refuses to render a paid job without this receipt.

the render receipt does not prove an ffprobe validation: ffprobe_pass is not true, OR ffprobe_duration is missing / <= 0, OR no video stream is recorded. ffprobe MUST validate every rendered MP4 before delivery; a file that plays locally may fail silently on the client platform. The ffprobe JSON is the proof of a valid render.

Kie generation was in scope (render receipt kie_in_scope:true) but the receipt carries no real kie_task_id / kie_result_url: the value is null, empty, or a placeholder token (e.g. 'TASK_ID', 'xxxx', 'TODO', 'fabricated', 'fake'). A missing/placeholder Kie task id means the generation either did not happen (fabrication) or was not recorded — both are unacceptable. The receipt is the anti-fabrication proof.

a native paid provider key (FAL_KEY/FAL_API_KEY/RUNWAY*/HEYGEN*/OPENAI_API_KEY/GOOGLE*/GEMINI*-for-imagery) was present in the recorded generation environment (render receipt generation_env / provider_used names a native provider). All generative assets MUST route through Kie.AI only; a native provider at generation time is a hard violation even if Kie was nominally selected.

the V-CONTROL postflight completeness gate failed: job-manifest status is not 'complete', OR a required deliverable (job-manifest.json / render-receipt.json / the final MP4 above its min_bytes floor) is missing, OR no downstream handoff was declared (captions->Skill 26, TTS->Skill 30, edit->Skill 27, or delivery to Head of Video Production). The client package must be a complete, validated bundle.

budget reconciliation failed at V-CONTROL: the job-manifest actual_cost_usd exceeds the brief's budget_ceiling_usd, or the cumulative spend crossed the config.yaml budget.total_usd cap without a circuit-breaker record. A run must never exceed the client's funded budget cap.

Phase-0 Kie.ai balance pre-flight. For a paid job the live credit balance (GET https://api.kie.ai/api/v1/chat/credit) is below the estimated floor for this job (estimated_cost_usd x VID_KIE_BALANCE_FLOOR_MULTIPLIER), OR the balance could not be verified. HARD-ABORTS (exit 4) before any paid dispatch so a run never dies mid-production. An unverifiable balance is never treated as 'enough'.

the deterministic driver (executive_producer.py) dispatched a phase without every lower-order phase having an attestation in working/checkpoints/video_process_manifest.json AND its produces_artifact present — and no logged OWNER-AUTHORIZED skip record (working/checkpoints/phase_skip_approvals.json owner_approved:true) covers the missing phase. Phase N+1 reads phase N's attestation as a precondition, so skipping/reordering (or running a phase under the wrong owning_role) is structurally impossible except via an explicit, logged owner authorization (e.g. the free documentary path's V-ANALYZE skip).

roles.description: The Movie Producer / pipeline operator. Takes a written brief or pipeline manifest and autonomously produces a finished, rendered, ffprobe-validated MP4 by driving the upstream OpenMontage engine (cloned on the client box). Owns every DMAIC phase of a production job; the Head of Video Production is the conductor/router, not the operator.
trigger_phrases: make a video from this script
turn this script into a video
roles.routing_note: Production-from-a-brief path (no human in the timeline). 'produce a video' / 'documentary montage' / 'finished MP4 from a script' -> Movie Producer (Skill 47). 'edit THIS footage' / hands-on cuts/color/timeline of supplied clips -> Video Editor (Skill 27). Captions on a finished MP4 -> Captioning Subtitling Specialist (Skill 26). Premium/expression TTS -> Fish Audio (Skill 30). Storyboard before production -> Storyboard Writer (Skill 24). The Head of Video Production routes the job here via the department conductor; the Movie Producer is the sole pipeline operator inside the job.

Department conductor / router. Receives the production request, routes it to the Movie Producer, and is the named approval authority for the Rule-Zero gate (V-ANALYZE) and the final delivery sign-off (V-CONTROL). Does NOT operate the pipeline.

handoff_targets.note: finished MP4 needs captions/subtitles burned in or as sidecar SRT
premium / expression-tagged TTS narration (beyond the free Piper path)
hands-on editorial cuts / color grade / timeline work on supplied or assembled footage
a storyboard must be authored before production starts
final delivery sign-off and client handoff
